section.heading: Limitation on compensation of Sergeant at Arms and Doorkeeper of Senate

content.p: The Sergeant at Arms and Doorkeeper of the Senate shall receive, directly or indirectly, no fees or other compensation or emolument whatever for performing the duties of the office, or in connection therewith, other than the salary prescribed by law.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 62 of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Similar Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were also contained in act Mar. 3, 1875, ch. 129, 18 Stat. 344.
